mapper.select: SELECT ca.id, ca.application_case_id, ca.job_posting_id, ca.job_posting_revision, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ca.company_summary, ca.recent_issues, ca.industry, ca.competitors, ca.interview_points, ca.sources, ca.verified_facts, ca.ai_inferences, ca.source_type, ca.checked_at, ca.refresh_recommended_at, ca.confirmed_at, ca.admin_memo, ca.created_at FROM company_analysis ca JOIN application_case ac ON ca.application_case_id = ac.id JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC, ca.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
